breakdown: This PR fixes evidence_utils.py to use 'worldarchitect.ai' (with dot) as the canonical root name, and refactors test methods in test_mcp_global_installation.py to correctly check shell script files (.github/scripts/skeptic-evaluate.sh) instead of workflow YAML files. The changes improve test accuracy by validating the actual execution targets. However, limited type safety is visible - primarily string-based assertions without TypedDict or dataclasses for structured data.
key_changes: Changed evidence root name from 'worldarchitectai' to 'worldarchitect.ai' in _get_evidence_tmp_root_name()
Updated docstring to reflect new domain name format
Refactored test methods to check skeptic-evaluate.sh script instead of workflow file
Added file existence assertions before reading script content
Adjusted test method names to suffix '_in_script' indicating script-based validation
